response:
# Basic Salad Ingredients

## Essential Base Ingredients
- [ ] Lettuce (romaine, iceberg, or mixed greens)
- [ ] Cherry tomatoes
- [ ] Cucumber
- [ ] Red onion
- [ ] Bell peppers (any color)

## Protein Options (Choose 1-2)
- [ ] Grilled chicken breast
- [ ] Hard-boiled eggs
- [ ] Chickpeas
- [ ] Tofu
- [ ] Turkey breast

## Healthy Fats
- [ ] Avocado
- [ ] Olive oil
- [ ] Nuts (almonds, walnuts, or pecans)
- [ ] Seeds (sunflower or pumpkin seeds)

## Dressing Basics
- [ ] Olive oil
- [ ] Lemon juice or vinegar
- [ ] Salt
- [ ] Black pepper
- [ ] Optional: garlic, herbs, or mustard

## Optional Add-ons
- [ ] Cheese (feta, parmesan, or mozzarella)
- [ ] Fresh herbs (basil, parsley, or cilantro)
- [ ] Carrots
- [ ] Celery
- [ ] Olives
